title: Tom Esparza
html:
Cold-outreach collaborator whose sender account (tom@tomesparza.com) wires the aeo agency's test campaigns — first mentioned in 2025 10 02 screenshot 2025 10 02 at 7 31 54 pm 62e69d9a. Possibly a co-conspirator or a hired sender; relationship to diddles unclear from this slice.

#stub

related.label: Cold-outreach test-email config — sender Tom Esparza
